name: Improve Animations
description: Motion polish for UI — timing, easing, reduced-motion, and interaction feedback that feels intentional.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-animations -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-animations -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-animations -a codex -g -y
